notes: This manifest points at real 5-minute OHLCV source files. The GitHub sandbox here could inspect the files, but direct raw downloads are blocked in this runtime; run the companion script locally to materialize CSV fixtures.
SPY files are Alpha Vantage-style JSON snapshots with metadata: Intraday (5min) OHLCV, symbol SPY, timezone US/Eastern.
The 2024-12-02 snapshot has Last Refreshed 2024-11-29 17:00:00, which captures the US post-Thanksgiving half-day plus after-hours tail. Filter to regular session to validate early close behavior.

lunch_break_market.required_shape: morning continuous session, explicit lunch gap, afternoon continuous session
lunch_break_market.note: I found official/current session-shape evidence for HKEX, but did not find a clean redistributable 5-minute OHLCV GitHub fixture for HKEX/TSE in this pass.
